title: June 12
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 12''' is the 163rd day of the year (164th in leap years), with 202 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[Len Wein]] is born.
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Michael Donovan]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Glynnis Talken Campbell]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Claudia Gray]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Zach Hanks]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 120|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 120]] published.
*[[1983]] – ''[[Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu]]'' published.
*[[1983]] – [[The Ewoks Join the Fight (storybook)|''The Ewoks Join the Fight'']] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 87|''Star Wars'' (1977) 87]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Madeleine Roux]] is born.
*[[2002]] – [[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express 2|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express'' 2]] published.
*2002 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 24]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Hunting the Hunters (Part I)]]'' published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2010]] – [[Al Williamson]] dies.
*[[2012]] – [[Star Wars Insider 134|''Star Wars Insider'' 134]] published.
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 6|''Star Wars'' (2013) 6]] published
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars Battlefront II]] Han Solo Season Part II content releases.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars Insider 190|''Star Wars Insider'' 190]] published.
*2019 – [[Vader - Dark Visions 5|''Vader - Dark Visions'' 5]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Score]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2020 – "[[Clash on Cloud City]]" premieres on YouTube.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: Commander]]'' shuts down.
*[[2023]] – [[John Romita Sr.]] dies.
*2023 – [[Treat Williams]] dies.
*[[2024]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 47|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 47]] to be published.
